title: MC Stadt Builder Modpack
body:
🏙️ Minecraft City 3.0 – Your City Life in Survival Style

Minecraft City 3.0 is a survival modpack with a light roleplay focus, specially designed for a realistic city life experience with trading, vehicles, voice chat, and a fully functional economy system.

🧱 What Does the Modpack Offer?

🔧 Realistic City Environment
Build your own house, buy plots, or design entire districts – thanks to decoration mods like Chipped, Macaw’s Mods, MrCrayfish’s Furniture, Decocraft, and many more.

💬 Voice Chat & Communication
With Simple Voice Chat, you can talk directly with other players – for more immersive roleplay and better coordination.

🚗 Vehicles & Road Construction
Using Immersive Vehicles, Ultimate Car Mod, and Saro’s Road Blocks, you can build cars, construct roads, and create entire traffic systems.

💰 Economy & Trading
A server-based economy system allows for jobs, shops, and money management – powered by mods like Saro’s Money Mod and a Vault-like Economy.

🗺️ Navigation & Comfort
JourneyMap, Xaero’s Map, JEI, AppleSkin, and many more make the survival experience smoother and more user-friendly.

🎮 Performance
Thanks to Embeddium, Oculus, and Sodium ports, the modpack runs smoothly even on lower-end PCs.

🤔 Why This Modpack?
Minecraft City 3.0 is made for players who:

enjoy playing in a team or community,

want to experience an immersive city atmosphere,

don’t like overly complex tech modpacks,

want to combine true survival with structure and interaction.

📌 Technical Info:

Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

Modloader: Forge

Runs on: Client & Server (both required)

Recommended RAM: 4–6 GB

Discord: discord.gg/4Za7jrga8w
